---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as documented
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What were you doing

A concise description of the command you ran / skill you invoked / GUI
action.

## What happened

Full error output, trace summary, or screenshot. If the engine crashed,
include everything from the shell starting with the command.

## What you expected

What the README / docs led you to expect instead.

## Environment

- `engine version`:
- `python --version`:
- OS:
- Ollama version (if local): `ollama --version`
- Installed models: `ollama list`
- SearXNG running? (y/n)
- `ENABLE_*` env vars set (mask any secrets)

## Minimal reproducer (optional but helpful)

```bash
# The exact commands, from a fresh clone, that reproduce the issue
```
